---
title: "test_06_combine_api_edm_data_2024_onwards"
output: html_document
---

This notebook wraps the current 2024+ EDM API contract regression script. The
old inline combine-script copy has been removed so the checks stay aligned with
the active implementation and the England-only live API contract.

```{r}
source(
  here::here("scripts", "R", "testing", "test_edm_api_pipeline_contracts.R"),
  local = TRUE
)
```
